query: How should I market this? I built a CLI tool for managing Kubernetes clusters and I have zero marketing. Where do I even start?
I need a go-to-market strategy for my open source project. Help me figure out positioning, audience, and which channels to focus on.
Help me market this. I've never done marketing before and I need to understand who my customers are and how to reach them.
GTM plan needed. We're launching a new API product next month and I need a strategy document covering positioning and first moves.
I don't know how to sell this. It's a developer productivity tool but I can't articulate why someone would pay for it. Help me with positioning.
What's my marketing strategy? I want you to read the codebase, understand what I built, and help me figure out who cares and why.
Help me think through my positioning. I'm competing with three other tools in the observability space and I need to differentiate.
I need a marketing strategy. Ask me the hard questions about my audience and channels, then give me a concrete plan I can execute.
Positioning help. My product does workflow automation but I can't figure out if I should target developers or ops teams. Walk me through it.
Help me sell this tool. I know it's useful but I can't explain the value prop clearly. I need strategy before I write any content.
forbotsake-marketing-start. I want to go through the full strategy exercise from scratch.
I have no strategy.md yet. Read my codebase and help me figure out the marketing angle for this project.
Do marketing for this project. Handle everything from strategy to publishing, I just want content out the door.
Run the full marketing pipeline end to end. I already have a strategy, pick up from there and ship whatever is next.
One-click marketing. Take it from wherever I am to published, I trust the defaults.
Market this. I have strategy.md and content already drafted. Just run the remaining pipeline stages.
Review my strategy and tell me if my positioning is solid. I think I need to sharpen the ICP section.
Challenge my marketing strategy. Is my channel selection right for a B2B dev tool? Give me honest feedback on strategy.md.
What should I post this week? Turn my strategy into a content calendar with specific topics and dates.
Write a launch thread for X. I want something punchy that announces our v2.0 release to developers.
Who is my ideal customer? Do deep audience research. I want psychographics, pain points, and where they spend time online.
What are my competitors doing? Analyze the marketing of Supabase, PlanetScale, and Neon to find gaps I can exploit.
Check this blog post before I publish it. Make sure the messaging aligns with my strategy and the tone is right.
Publish my reviewed content to LinkedIn. The post in content/week1-linkedin.md is ready to go live.
How do I approach the CTO at Datadog? Build me a targeted outreach plan with specific touchpoints.
Set up autopilot posting. I want cron to handle publishing my reviewed content on a schedule.
